MeaMod.Packager 2.0.0
Copyright © 2006-2022 MeaMod Group

  -v, --source-version      Required. Set the version in package details JSON
                            file

  -s, --source-file         Required. Sets source file used to generate package
                            details JSON file

  -o, --output-file         Sets the output JSON file name

  -d, --output-directory    Sets the output directory for the JSON file

  --help                    Display this help screen.

  --version                 Display version information.
